top_signals.title: Morocco Takes Rate Pause Into Second Year With Eye on Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Morocco kept interest rates on hold, seeking to keep borrowing flowing for a football World Cup-linked building boom while guarding against inflationary risks as the US and Iran try and reach a lasting peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy
top_signals.summary:
In the public perception, it seems like a big deal for Germany to publish a military strategy for the first time. But let me pour a little cold water on that. A form of military strategy has always existed. Where today we have a National Security Strategy paired with a military strategy and Plan for the Armed Forces, the past offered the White Paper, Defence Policy Guidelines, and the Bundeswehr concept, which spelled out the armed forces’ structure in more concrete terms. Yet even the new military strategy, released in late April, reads more as analysis than as a clear

The post A Claim to Lead, a Hesitation to Act: Germany’s New Military Strategy appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: First Time Buyer ISA consultation
top_signals.summary: The government is publishing a consultation on the implementation of a new, simpler ISA product to support first time buyers to buy a home.

top_signals.title: Ground view Kazakhstan: The visibility bargain
top_signals.summary: Qarmet, a Kazakhstani steel and mining company, inherited deadly mines and responded with extensive surveillance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: OKX Europe chief says 80% of crypto exchanges won’t survive MiCA as deadline nears
top_signals.summary: OKX Europe CEO Ghoos said 80% of exchanges won't survive MiCA as ESMA forces unlicensed firms to cease EU operations by July 1.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Battery Storage Installations Set to Quadruple by 2030
top_signals.summary: further accelerate through 2030 as utility-scale projects lead growth, the SolarPower Europe association said in a new report on Tuesday. Last year, the European battery storage market saw 36 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of new installations, up by 48% from 2024, when growth had slowed. Installations rebounded strongly in 2025, and are set to continue accelerating. This year, annual installations are expected to top 50 GWh, SolarPower Europe said. The annual pace of new additions is then projected to jump to as much as 138 GWh in 2030, which would be a…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
